mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_pull_log (task_id, table_code, table_name, operation_type, status, start_time, end_time, duration_ms, total_count, success_count, fail_count, error_message, error_stack, operator) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{tableCode}, #{tableName}, #{operationType}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMs}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorStack}, #{operator})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_pull_log SET status = #{status}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_stack = #{errorStack} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
